# Spam keyword list for the issue-triage workflow.
# One keyword or phrase per line. Case-insensitive substring match.
# Lines starting with "#" and blank lines are ignored.
#
# An issue whose title or body contains ANY of these is auto-labeled
# "spam", closed (not planned), and locked. Keep entries SPECIFIC so a
# real bug report never matches by accident — prefer multi-word phrases
# over single common words.
#
# The workflow also auto-flags issues with >= 6 links (link flooding) and
# fake-star / brigading "dispute" posts, independent of this list.
#
# --- add one term per line below this line ---

# Crypto / airdrop / giveaway scams
free airdrop
claim your airdrop
crypto giveaway
connect your wallet
seed phrase
double your eth

# Gambling
online casino
betting site

# Paid boosting / contact harvesting
buy github stars
boost your repo
add my whatsapp
add my telegram
add my wechat
contact me on telegram
seo backlinks
cheap followers
